parameters.query: SELECT p.list_id, p.name, p.position, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.status, p.responsible, COALESCE(card_counts.total, 0) as total_cards, COALESCE(card_counts.done, 0) as done_cards FROM project_phases p LEFT JOIN (SELECT lista_nombre, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN completada THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as done FROM estado_tareas GROUP BY lista_nombre) card_counts ON p.name = card_counts.lista_nombre ORDER BY p.position ASC;
INSERT INTO project_phases (list_id, name, position) VALUES ($1, $2, $3) ON CONFLICT (list_id) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, position = EXCLUDED.position, updated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO project_phases (list_id, name, start_date, end_date, position) VALUES (gen_random_uuid()::text, $1, $2, $3, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(position),0)+1 FROM project_phases)) RETURNING list_id, name, start_date, end_date;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Parse Phase Command').item.json.name, $('Parse Phase Command').item.json.start_date, $('Parse Phase Command').item.json.end_date] }}

parameters.query: UPDATE project_phases SET status = 'archived', updated_at = NOW() WHERE list_id = $1 RETURNING name;
SELECT ca.attachment_id, ca.filename, ca.url, ca.summary_extracted, ca.summary_extracted_at, ca.file_size_bytes FROM card_attachments ca WHERE ca.card_id = $1 ORDER BY ca.added_at DESC LIMIT 5;

parameters.text:
={{ 'Eres un asistente experto en gestión de proyectos de software. Se te proporciona el contenido de un documento técnico adjunto a una tarjeta de Trello.

Documento: ' + $json.filename + '
Tamaño: ' + Math.round(($json.file_size_bytes || 0) / 1024) + ' KB
URL: ' + $json.url + '

Analiza el documento y proporciona:
1. Resumen ejecutivo (máx 3 oraciones)
2. Módulos o componentes principales cubiertos
3. Estado o avance implícito del trabajo
4. Riesgos o puntos de atención detectados

Sé conciso. Máximo 400 palabras.' }}

parameters.query: UPDATE card_attachments SET summary_extracted = $1, summary_extracted_at = NOW(), tokens_used = $2 WHERE attachment_id = $3;
